title: Pricing Plans
subtitle: Choose the plan that works for you

page.heroDesc: No hidden fees. No commission on provincially insured services. Start free, upgrade when you're ready.
page.tabProviderDesc: For individual practitioners running a solo or small practice
page.tabClinicDesc: For multi-provider clinics, health teams, and specialist groups
page.transactionDesc: A transparent commission applies only to private-pay and direct-pay patient transactions processed through the platform. Provincially insured services are never subject to commission.
page.provincialCommissionDesc: No commission on OHIP, RAMQ, MSP, etc.
page.whyDesc: Built specifically for the Canadian healthcare market with features you will not find in legacy EMR systems.
page.feat1Desc: Tamper-evident cryptographic record of every data access and clinical event.
page.feat2Desc: Native FHIR data structures with ICD-10, SNOMED CT, CPT, and LOINC coding.
page.feat3Desc: Time-based access windows checked at every query. No backdoors.
page.feat4Desc: Prescriptions flow directly to the patient's chosen pharmacy with full tracking.
page.ctaDesc: Join hundreds of Canadian healthcare providers who trust Doktochain for their practice management, telemedicine, and patient engagement.
page.foundingDesc1: Be among the first 30 providers to join and lock in Solo Pro at
page.foundingDesc2: Full platform access, no strings attached.

faq.title: Pricing FAQ
faq.a1: Yes. All paid plans include a 14-day free trial with full access to every feature. No credit card required to start.
faq.q2: What happens with provincially insured services (OHIP, RAMQ, MSP)?
faq.a2: Doktochain never charges a commission on provincially insured billings. Transaction fees only apply to private-pay and direct-pay services processed through the platform.
faq.q3: How does per-seat pricing work for clinics?
faq.a3: Each clinic plan includes a set number of provider seats. A seat is one active provider affiliated with your clinic. If a provider works at multiple clinics, each clinic pays for their seat independently.
faq.a4: Absolutely. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time. When upgrading, you receive immediate access to the new features and we prorate the difference. When downgrading, the change takes effect at your next billing date.
faq.q5: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a5: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) and Canadian bank debit via our secure Stripe integration. Enterprise clients can pay by invoice with net-30 terms.
faq.q6: Is my data secure and PIPEDA compliant?
faq.a6: Yes. All data is stored in Canadian data centres, encrypted at rest and in transit. Our database-enforced consent model with time-based access windows and cryptographic hash-chain audit trail exceeds standard PIPEDA requirements.
faq.q7: Do patients pay to use Doktochain?
faq.a7: Never. Patients always have free, unrestricted access to their health records, appointment booking, messaging, and prescriptions. Doktochain is funded entirely by provider and pharmacy subscriptions.
faq.q8: What is the Founding Member discount?
faq.a8: Our first 30 providers receive a permanent discounted rate of $69/month for the Solo Pro plan, locked in for the lifetime of their account. This applies to new registrations during our launch period.
